title: tabernaemontana kwangsiensis
intro: Tabernaemontana kwangsiensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae, commonly known as the Kwangsi tabernaemontana or Kwangsi yellow wood, native to southern China. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Tabernaemontana kwangsiensis include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating pain, as well as its potential use in treating various infections and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as decoctions and infusions, are often used in traditional Chinese medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
